response.overview: In Newport Bay, a coastal town in California, a festival called Summerween is held every summer. This festival celebrates Halloween with a summer theme: parties, music, fairs, and even the cinema is transformed with horror films.  One year during Summerween, a group of friends decided to go to one of the parties, and it ended up being one of the most incredible and crazy summers in their history, filled with horror, mystery, and drama.
response.title: Summerween
